title: Radioactive Labeling with T4 PNK 3' phosphatase minus (M0236)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9lnr7","text":"Radioactive Labeling with T4 Polynucleotide Kinase 3' phosphatase minus.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"fho88","text":"Please refer to the Safety Data Sheets (SDS) for health and environmental hazard.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Set-up the following reaction: A B 1 Component Amount 2 DNA Up to 50 pmol of 5´ termini 3 T4 PNK Reaction Buffer (10X) 5 µl 4 ATP (10 mM) 50 pmol of [γ-32P] ATP 5 T4 PNK 2 µl (20 units) 6 Nuclease-free Water up to 50 µl Note: [ 33 P] ATP may be substituted for [ 32 P] ATP.
Heat inactivate by incubating at 65 °C for 00:20:00 .
creator: New England   Biolabs
